rationale: The candidate 9a572d249e1abc11902ee10f271e5eddb1a02a9e is selected because it uses a more natural and direct German style ('Man kann' instead of 'Sie können') which better fits the original author's tone. It also correctly uses a non-breaking hyphen in 'Promise-Fallen' (though it uses a slightly different dash, it's typographically acceptable) and provides a clean, accurate translation of the technical concepts. The other candidates (current and Qwen) are identical to each other and slightly more formal/stiff.
